title: StackPicks · Magic UI + Aceternity — eye-candy components

rows.title: Animated components, copy-paste ready
rows.desc: Aurora backgrounds. Spotlight effects. Beam animations. Globe. Particles.

rows.title: Built on shadcn + Motion
rows.desc: Same DNA you already use. Drop into any shadcn project — zero config wrestling.

rows.title: Free + open source
rows.desc: 150+ components between them. MIT licensed. Source on GitHub. No paywall.

install.body: No npm install. Browse the showcase, click a component, copy the code into your repo. shadcn deps already in your project? You're set.

rows.title: Magic UI wins for
rows.desc: Subtler effects. Text animations, button hovers, marquees. Cleaner code.

rows.title: Aceternity wins for
rows.desc: Bigger statement pieces. 3D card flips, spotlight cursors, full-screen effects.

rows.title: Use both together
rows.desc: Same shadcn base, no conflicts. Mix-and-match. That's the magic of copy-paste.

take.use_if: You're building a landing page that needs to feel premium. Particle hero, aurora gradient, animated CTA. 20 minutes of work, 10x perceived effort.
take.skip_if: You're building a dashboard or admin UI. Eye candy in functional surfaces = friction. Use shadcn proper.
take.sub: Both MIT. Both free. Both maintained actively.

more.body: shadcn/ui · Tremor · Park UI · Radix Themes. Curated takes.
more.sub: 14 picks · all open source · updated this week

caption_line: Aurora text, particle heroes, beams — Magic UI + Aceternity. Drop-in eye candy for shadcn projects. Comment MAGIC for both showcases ↓
